query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_proyectos,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'cotizacion_aprobada' THEN 1 END) as proyectos_aprobados,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'design' THEN 1 END) as proyectos_design,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'modeling_pending' THEN 1 END) as proyectos_modeling
FROM projects;

SELECT 
  id,
  status,
  totalAmount,
  createdAt
FROM projects
ORDER BY id DESC
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bxEETtHLyojAa4.root --database XhEkCr8yXcaeDFyuQebdJQ --execute SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_proyectos,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'cotizacion_aprobada' THEN 1 END) as proyectos_aprobados,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'design' THEN 1 END) as proyectos_design,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'modeling_pending' THEN 1 END) as proyectos_modeling
FROM projects;

SELECT 
  id,
  status,
  totalAmount,
  createdAt
FROM projects
ORDER BY id DESC
LIMIT 10;
